title: eragrostis cylindriflora
intro: Eragrostis cylindriflora, also known as cylindrical spike-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis cylindriflora include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. Eragrostis cylindriflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in certain parts of the world.
